text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her attention on medium-distance races,
Sakura Bakushin O secretively conducts research
on two of her peers, Rice Shower and Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a thorough assessment, Sakura Bakushin O
successfully pinpoints the two's capabilities.
However, her self-analysis is lacking in
comparison. She has a tendency to run wild with
passion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at a complete loss for a strategy to deal with
this flaw of hers.
